title: Kids Toys STEM Board Games, Smart Logical Road Builder 56 x 56CM with 200+ Challenges & 4 Difficulty Levels, Educational Montessori Toys Birthday Gifts for Kids Boys Girls Age 4-8 Year Old
features: Large Size Logical Road Puzzle Track Games: Boost your child's cognitive skills with our large 56 x 56cm STEM board game, packed with 3 play modes (Single Player Mode, Two Cars Relay Mode, Two Players Competitive Mode) and over 200 challenges for endless fun.Ideal for family bonding, it's perfect for kids aged 4 5 6 7 8. Enhance logic with COSICOSY engaging, multi-level stem toys

Battery-Free Fun Pull-Back Car: Set the course, wind up the car by sliding it back, hold the brake button, place it at the start, and release for a swift take-off! This battery-free smart marble track game is an engaging STEM boys toy that challenges kids to design and test their own tracks. Watch as the car races towards the finish line, transporting the marble, enhancing spatial awareness and problem-solving skills

4-Tiered Challenge with Detailed Manual: Dive into our engaging smart board game, featuring 208 puzzles across 4 skill levels, from Starter to Master, each meticulously detailed in our comprehensive guide. This board games for 4 5 6 7 8 year old is an excellent tool for cognitive development and a delightful way to spend quality time with your family

Safety & Educational Toy: Explore a screen-free play experience with our high-quality, smooth-edged kids board game, designed for child safety. It's perfect for enhancing creativity and logical thinking, while fostering family bonding and cooperative play. This Montessori-inspired toy is an excellent alternative to electronic devices, aiding children in developing attention and concentration in a tranquil and stimulating environment

Fun Learning Gift for All Ages: A delightful gift for 4 5 6 7 8 year old boys or girls, our STEM board game is perfect for birthdays, holidays, or any special day. With adjustable difficulty, it's suitable for a range of ages, encouraging imagination and problem-solving.The game promotes teamwork and includes a handy storage bag for easy cleanup. Ideal for family gatherings, parties, and educational settings
description: Product Description COSICOSY 56 x 56cm Large Size Baseboard Game for Family 3 Game Modes: Single Player, Two Players Competitive, Two Car Relay Board Games for 4-8 Year Old COSICOSY 2024 New Smart Logical Road Builder is a STEM Board Game, which can enhance children's ability of imagination and problem-solving , and find more fun. 4 Difficulty Levels- Starter, Intermediate, Expert, and Master 200+ Exciting Challenges This road-building puzzle maze game is designed to stimulate young minds and offers age-appropriate challenges that will keep them engaged for years. Designing your own route, watching the tractor deliver the ball to the end is quite entertaining. Safe & Child-friendly Play this stem toys with your child to strengthen your bond and hone their logical reasoning and spatial thinking skills . Design an Adventure for Your Children Perfect Educational Gift for Kids Fun logical games make favorite gifts for children aged 4 6 7 8 , perfect for birthdays, Christmas, parties, Children's Day, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and New Year. They're ideal for both indoor and outdoor play, as well as for family gatherings, kindergartens, and preschool activities.
